query_normalized: predicting material properties from compositional data with graph neural networks materials science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (b) and (f) as it addresses the same dependent variable (property prediction) on a highly overlapping domain (molecular and materials design), which serves as the canonical alternative-vocabulary cluster for material property prediction in the context of AI-driven graph learning. Although it focuses on few-shot learning, lit-review references are expected to be partial matches that establish the methodological landscape and domain baseline.
